pi_items.source: AMA CPT code database verified via AAPC, MediBill, FindACode, and multiple healthcare billing resources
Standard medical billing terminology; CPT4 is the universal code type for Current Procedural Terminology codes in US healthcare systems including LibreHealth EHR and OpenEMR
Medicare Physician Fee Schedule 2026 shows $41.42 for CPT 99458; 2024 average was $41.00. Metadata value of $42.00 is approximately correct within 1% of actual Medicare rates.

privileged_info_summary: CPT code 99458 is a verified medical billing code used for Remote Physiologic Monitoring treatment management services, each additional 20 minutes beyond the initial 20 minutes covered by CPT 99457. The code is officially recognized by the American Medical Association. The metadata specifies a fee of $42.00, which aligns with 2026 Medicare Physician Fee Schedule rates ($41.42 non-facility rate). All required keywords (remote, physiologic, monitoring, 20) are present in the official AMA code description. The task environment uses real NHANES patient data (9,375 actual patients from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) within LibreHealth EHR, though the specific code 99458 is intentionally deleted at task setup to test whether agents can successfully add new billing codes.
